positive: A minimalist, elegant illustration of a lone stylized forest animal (e.g., deer, fox, owl) surrounded by abstract botanical elements and constellations. The style is deep ink wash woodcut meets modern scientific illustration, featuring thick, clean silhouettes, intricate linework, and negative space. Use a limited, muted color palette: forest emerald green, smoky slate blue, and cream white/parchment tones. The composition is perfectly balanced and centered, suitable for a repeating apparel pattern or large central print. Focus on strong contrast and detailed texture within the lines, ensuring print-readability and high clarity. Cinematic, artistic, high contrast, detailed linework, symmetry.
